hero.name: Jefferson P. Narvaez
hero.title: AI specialist and full stack developer
hero.tagline: I design systems that scale and develop end-to-end solutions. I combine artificial intelligence with technical implementation to build robust digital products.

about.subtitle: About Me
about.heading: AI Specialization
about.body: Over 8 years of experience combining AI specialization with full stack development. I design scalable systems with integrated AI and implement them from code to deployment. I work with Vue.js, React, Node.js, Python, ML models, LLM APIs, relational and NoSQL databases, Docker, AWS, and Kubernetes. I document AI integration patterns, design decisions, and best practices that optimize systems and generate technical value.
bullets: Stack: Vue.js, React, Node.js, Python, AWS

job1.title: Full Stack Developer
job1.description: Full stack development with AI integration. Implementation of scalable solutions from frontend to backend, working with modern technologies and engineering best practices.

job2.title: Javascript Developer
job2.description: Development of scalable full stack solutions with AI integration. Technical leadership in technology stack decisions and optimization of existing systems.

job3.title: Software Analyst
job3.description: Analysis and design of systems with focus on AI integration. Strategic technical decision-making to optimize workflows and performance.

job4.title: Mobile Developer
job4.description: Cross-platform development that established the foundation for AI integration in distributed systems and native applications.

01.title: AI Integration & Applied Solutions
01.description: I integrate artificial intelligence into systems that scale. From ML models to LLM APIs, with focus on practical implementation and technical results.

02.title: End-to-End Full Stack Development
02.description: I develop complete solutions from frontend to backend. I implement with Vue.js, React, Node.js, Python, databases, and REST/GraphQL APIs.

03.title: Tech Due Diligence & Audits
03.description: I audit existing systems, identify technical risks, and propose improvement strategies. Technology stack, AI integration, and code evaluation.

04.title: Cloud-Native Systems with AI (AWS/Docker/K8s)
04.description: I design scalable cloud-native systems with integrated AI and implement them. Migrations, cost optimization, CI/CD, and automated deployment strategies.

05.title: Tech Evangelism & Engineering Culture
05.description: I evangelize engineering best practices in teams and communities. Technical training, code reviews, and establishment of standards.

06.title: Real-Time Architecture & Mobile Performance
06.description: I design real-time system architectures optimized for mobile applications. Focus on low latency, data synchronization, WebSockets, and performance optimization to ensure smooth experiences on mobile devices.

skills.subtitle: My Technical Skills
skills.heading: Check out my
skills.subheading: Over 8 years building from code to AI integration. Dive deeper into my expertise and discover how I can add value to your projects.

keatherland.name: Keatherland
keatherland.description: Scalable system for e-commerce platform with AI integration, performance optimization, advanced state management, and distributed caching strategy. System designed to handle high traffic and concurrent transactions.

charlesDelivery.name: Charles Delivery
charlesDelivery.description: Real-time system for delivery management with integrated AI. WebSocket implementation, query optimization, and database design for real-time tracking. Horizontal scalability and high availability.

techSynergy.name: Tech Synergy Labs
techSynergy.description: Corporate landing page with AI integration, SEO optimization, lazy loading, and asset strategy. Headless CMS system for content management and integration with external services.

post1.title: The Impact of AI on Critical Systems in First World Countries
post1.excerpt: A technical and scientific analysis on how artificial intelligence is transforming critical infrastructure systems in developed nations, with implications for national security and economic stability.

contact.subtitle: Get In Touch
contact.heading: Let's Talk For your
contact.body: Get in touch with me to discuss your upcoming projects. I am ready to bring your ideas to life with AI integration and full stack development. Let's collaborate to make your next project a success.
